summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Ankit Anand portfolio website. All pages load correctly, navigation works, and core interactive features function as expected.

ui_bugs.issue: Tabs (Career Overview, Professional Journey, Technology Stack) and content are not visible on initial load screenshot - appears blank/dark below heading. Content only appears after JS fully loads and interaction. May be animation/visibility issue on cold load.

issues: Hero content (CTA buttons, stats row, social links) may be cut off on 1080p viewport - items below fold due to large hero section height. Consider reducing padding for smaller screens.

critical_code_review_comments: Contact form validation uses custom JS validation (not HTML5 required) - shows inline red error messages correctly. Good implementation.
Projects filter uses kebab-case IDs (e.g. 'machine-learning', 'data-analysis') not matching the button labels shown (ML, Analytics) - tests must use correct IDs.
Experience page: on direct URL load, tabs appear invisible briefly (animation fade-in) but become interactive after load - not a bug, just animation behavior.
mocked_apis: Contact form submission is MOCKED - shows success state after 1.5s delay without actual email sending
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pure frontend React TypeScript portfolio. No backend. All 5 pages tested: Home, About, Experience, Projects, Contact. All navigation works. Tabs work on About (Biography/Current Focus/Education) and Experience (Career Overview/Professional Journey/Technology Stack). Projects filter buttons use data-testid='filter-{id}' where id is kebab-case (machine-learning, data-analysis, computer-vision, web-development, all). Project modal opens/closes correctly. Contact form has inline validation and MOCKED success state. Theme toggle works. Skills Radar on About page is interactive but skill detail panel not found via test - may appear as tooltip or inline update.
